description_long: This object is a ground-mounted solar energy installation featuring a rectangular array of dark photovoltaic panels supported by a robust frame. The panels are arranged in a single, flat-topped block, elevated above a patterned base that resembles a concrete or modular foundation. The structure includes a series of supporting posts and side barriers, likely for stability and protection. The surface of the panels is smooth and reflective, with visible grid lines indicating individual solar cells. The base platform is textured with a repeating geometric pattern, suggesting durability and weather resistance. No visible electrical inverters or cabling are present, and the installation appears designed for outdoor urban environments such as parks, parking lots, or public plazas.
description: A ground-mounted solar panel array with a rectangular, grid-like arrangement of dark photovoltaic panels on a sturdy, patterned base. The installation features a raised, flat surface and robust side supports.
description_view_0: Front view shows the rectangular solar panel array elevated on a patterned base, with side supports and a clear view of the panel surface.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the length of the array, the supporting posts beneath, and the layered structure of the base.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the array, with visible support structures and the patterned base extending outward.
description_view_3: Opposite side view reveals the open space beneath the panels and the arrangement of the support posts.
attribute_mounting_structure_type: ground-mounted with a metal frame and concrete base
attribute_array_configuration: single rectangular block, approximately 3x6 grid of panels
